name: biomcp
description: Read-only biomedical search and evidence retrieval across BioMCP's CLI command grammar.
long_description: BioMCP packages the existing Rust CLI and MCP server as a local read-only bundle for biomedical discovery, detail lookups, cross-entity pivots, enrichment, and study analytics.

tools.name: biomcp
tools.description: Run read-only BioMCP commands for biomedical search, detail retrieval, discovery, enrichment, and study analytics.

oncokb_token.title: OncoKB Token
oncokb_token.description: Optional. Enables OncoKB therapy and level evidence for variant oncokb <id>.

disgenet_api_key.title: DisGeNET API Key
disgenet_api_key.description: Optional. Enables DisGeNET scored association sections for genes and diseases.

s2_api_key.title: Semantic Scholar API Key
s2_api_key.description: Optional. Improves reliability for article TLDR, citation, reference, and recommendation calls.
